# Design to Unity

> MCP server that turns Lanhu, Figma, PSD / PSB, and Photoshop UI designs into Unity-ready design handoff packets, assets, source maps, and UGUI prefab outputs.

Design to Unity is built for AI-assisted game UI implementation. It exposes design structure, geometry, text, assets, component hints, visual-risk metadata, reusable prefab candidates, and Unity import plans through MCP tools so AI agents and Unity tooling can reconstruct UI with less ambiguity.

Repository: https://github.com/Crackerrrrrr/design-to-unity
Package name: design-to-unity
MCP server name: io.github.crackerrrrrr/design-to-unity

## Primary Documentation

- [English README](README.md): Product overview, install instructions, tool lists, Unity importer usage, TMP font mapping, and source coverage.
- [Chinese README](README.zh-CN.md): Chinese product overview and workflow documentation.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Current release notes.
- [MCP Registry metadata](server.json): Registry-facing installation and package metadata.
- [Publishing guide](docs/publishing.md): PyPI, MCP Registry, and repository release checklist.
- [Launch kit](docs/launch-kit.md): GitHub Release text, launch posts, and demo script.

## Core Capabilities

- Convert Lanhu pages into normalized packets, slices, summaries, Unity plans, and prefab YAML.
- Convert Figma REST files, local snapshots, plugin exports, pages, frames, and components into the same packet model.
- Convert PSD / PSB files and Photoshop UXP export folders into packets and Unity outputs.
- Generate Unity source maps beside prefab YAML for traceability and editor importer input.
- Install Unity Editor importer / validator scripts into a Unity project.
- Report readiness issues such as missing TMP font mappings, complex visual effects, masks, blur, blend modes, layout risk, and export fallbacks.
- Compare Unity screenshots against design references with visual diff helpers.

## Important MCP Tools

Lanhu:

- `lanhu_design_list`
- `lanhu_design_prepare_packet`
- `lanhu_design_get_packet`
- `lanhu_design_get_summary`
- `lanhu_design_get_node_tree`
- `lanhu_design_get_asset_manifest`
- `lanhu_design_get_slices`
- `lanhu_design_get_unity_plan`
- `lanhu_design_write_unity_prefab_yaml`
- `lanhu_design_verify_unity_prefab_yaml`

Figma:

- `figma_design_list_pages`
- `figma_design_list_frames`
- `figma_design_list_components`
- `figma_design_prepare_packet`
- `figma_design_prepare_batch_packets`
- `figma_design_prepare_export_packet`
- `figma_design_prepare_snapshot_packet`
- `figma_design_get_unity_readiness_report`
- `figma_design_write_unity_prefab_yaml`
- `figma_design_write_batch_unity_prefab_yaml`
- `figma_design_convert_to_unity_prefab`
- `figma_design_convert_export_to_unity_prefab`
- `figma_design_install_unity_editor_importer`

PSD / Photoshop:

- `psd_design_prepare_packet`
- `psd_design_prepare_export_packet`
- `psd_design_validate_export`
- `psd_design_get_unity_readiness_report`
- `psd_design_compare_unity_screenshot`
- `psd_design_convert_to_unity_prefab`
- `psd_design_convert_export_to_unity_prefab`
- `psd_design_install_unity_editor_validator`

Unity:

- `design_to_unity_install_unity_editor_importer`

## Configuration

- `LANHU_COOKIE`: Optional Lanhu cookie for Lanhu project access.
- `DDS_COOKIE`: Optional DDS cookie; defaults to `LANHU_COOKIE`.
- `FIGMA_TOKEN`: Optional Figma personal access token.
- `FIGMA_OAUTH_TOKEN`: Optional Figma OAuth token.
- `DATA_DIR`: Local packet and asset cache directory, default `./data`.
- `MCP_TRANSPORT`: Use `stdio` for registry/client package execution or `http` for local HTTP MCP serving.
- `UNITY_TMP_FONT_ASSET_GUID`: Optional default TMP font asset GUID.
- `UNITY_TMP_FONT_ASSET_MAP_JSON`: Optional JSON font-family to TMP GUID map.
- `UNITY_TMP_FONT_ASSET_MAP_PATH`: Optional path to a font map JSON file.

## Agent Guidance

- Prefer packet and source-map fields over guessing from rendered images.
- Use readiness reports before writing Unity prefabs when fidelity matters.
- Use the Unity Editor importer for production prefab creation; use static YAML for quick inspection and AI follow-up.
- Keep business scripts, animation binding, runtime data binding, and project-specific behavior in Unity.
- Treat generated prefab YAML as a structured snapshot, not as a replacement for project-specific UI engineering.
